# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-svc
  labels:
    app: memcached
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 6379 # The port that this service should serve on
  selector:
    app: memcached


apiVersion: apps/v1beta2
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached-deploy
spec:
  replicas: 1 # tells deployment to run 1 pods matching the template
  strategy: 
    type: RollingUpdate 
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
      - image: memcached
        name: memcached-container


apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-svc
  labels: 
    app: web
  ports: 
  - protocol: TCP
    port: 80 # port to expose on the pod
    targetPort: http
spec:
  type: NodePort
  selector:
      app: web
